panels.title: Aggregate PnL (from backtest day 0) — ${underlying}
panels.description: All strategies combined for this underlying, PnL normalised from strategy inception (not the selected time range). Production vs Backtest overlaid.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(cumulative_pnl) ELSE sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Production PnL` FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, `Backtest PnL`, `Benchmark` FROM (SELECT time, `Backtest PnL`, `Benchmark`, n_strats, max(n_strats) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 8640 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS trailing_max FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(cumulative_pnl) ELSE sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Backtest PnL`, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(benchmark * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(benchmark) ELSE sum(benchmark * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Benchmark`, uniq(strategy_table_name) AS n_strats FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time)) WHERE n_strats >= trailing_max * 0.65 ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(cumulative_pnl) ELSE sum(cumulative_pnl * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Real Trade PnL` FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Aggregate PnL (from 0%) — ${underlying}
panels.description: All strategies combined for this underlying. Production vs Backtest overlaid. PnL normalised to 0% at the start of the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Production PnL` FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, `Backtest PnL`, `Benchmark` FROM (SELECT time, `Backtest PnL`, `Benchmark`, n_strats, max(n_strats) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 30 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS trailing_max FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Backtest PnL`, sum(b * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) AS `Benchmark`, uniq(strategy_table_name) AS n_strats FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p, benchmark - first_value(benchmark) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS b FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) AS bt_data GROUP BY time ORDER BY time)) WHERE n_strats >= trailing_max * 0.65 ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Real Trade PnL` FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) AS rt_data GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: ${underlying} — Drawdown
panels.description: Drawdown from peak for the combined strategy return on this underlying.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Production Drawdown` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS agg_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Backtest Drawdown`, agg_bm - max(agg_bm) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Benchmark Drawdown` FROM (SELECT time, agg_pnl, agg_bm FROM (SELECT time, agg_pnl, agg_bm, n_strats, max(n_strats) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 30 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS trailing_max FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS agg_pnl, sum(b * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) AS agg_bm, uniq(strategy_table_name) AS n_strats FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p, benchmark - first_value(benchmark) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS b FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) AS bt_data GROUP BY time ORDER BY time)) WHERE n_strats >= trailing_max * 0.65) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, agg_pnl - max(agg_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS `Real Trade Drawdown` FROM (SELECT toStartOfMinute(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(p * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(p) ELSE sum(p * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS agg_pnl FROM (SELECT ts, strategy_table_name, weighting, cumulative_pnl - first_value(cumulative_pnl) OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_table_name ORDER BY ts) AS p FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000))) GROUP BY time) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Aggregate Position — ${underlying}
panels.description: Aggregated position across all strategies trading this underlying. Aggregation follows the selected PnL mode.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(position * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(position) ELSE sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Production Position` FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, `Backtest Position` FROM (SELECT time, `Backtest Position`, n_strats, max(n_strats) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS trailing_max FROM (SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(position * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(position) ELSE sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Backtest Position`, uniq(strategy_table_name) AS n_strats FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_bt_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time)) WHERE n_strats >= trailing_max * 0.65 ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, CASE WHEN '${mode}' = 'raw_weighted' THEN sum(position * weighting) WHEN '${mode}' = 'equal' THEN avg(position) ELSE sum(position * weighting) / nullIf(sum(weighting), 0) END AS `Real Trade Position` FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_real_trade_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Per-Instance Position — ${underlying}
panels.description: Individual position for each strategy instance trading this underlying. Each line is one strategy_table_name.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(ts) AS time, strategy_table_name, argMax(position, ts) AS position FROM (SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1min_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 <= 86400 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM analytics.strategy_pnl_1hour_prod_v2 WHERE (${__to} - ${__from}) / 1000 > 86400) WHERE (empty('${underlying}') OR `underlying` = '${underlying}') AND ts >= toDateTime(intDiv(${__from},1000)) AND ts <= toDateTime(intDiv(${__to},1000)) GROUP BY time, strategy_table_name ORDER BY time

list.name: underlying
list.label: Underlying
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT underlying FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 ORDER BY underlying
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT underlying FROM analytics.strategy_output_history_v2 ORDER BY underlying

list.name: mode
list.label: PnL Mode
list.query: Rescaled : rescaled,Raw Weighted : raw_weighted,Equal Weighted : equal
list.description: Rescaled: sum(pnl*w)/sum(w) — normalized to 100%. Raw Weighted: sum(pnl*w) — actual portfolio contribution. Equal Weighted: avg(pnl) — every instance equal.
